parameters-en.Freq: Sets the frequency of the shifter effect.
parameters-en.Mode: Selects the type of frequency shifting applied. "Up" shifts the frequency up, "Down" shifts the frequency... you guessed it--down. "Stereo" shifts the frequency both up and down and routes them to the left and right channels, respectively.
parameters-en.Mix: Controls the blend between the frequency shifter effect and the dry signal. At 0%, no effected signal is heard; at 100%, no dry signal is heard.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block.
